name: Palak Trivedi
trait: Dependable. Puts blue in everything because blue is safe.

badges.label: Dependable Hands
badges.desc: No drama, no genius. Shows up, ships.

name: Arya
trait: Smart but lazy. Magic on hard cuts, allergic to boring ones. Alive only after dark.

badges.label: Night Magic
badges.desc: +70% speed after 6 PM. Mornings are a rumour.

badges.label: Hard-Brief Genius
badges.desc: Flies on ★★★★+ briefs. Crawls and complains on easy ones.

name: Devang Mistry
trait: Sab ho jayega. Statics, reels, decks, shoots. Everything. One man. So many briefs.

badges.label: Sab Ho Jayega
badges.desc: Takes ANY brief from ANY department. The whole agency on one chair.

badges.label: Clutch Gene
badges.desc: +50% speed when the deadline is under 30%. Thrives on panic.

lines: send it, I will fix live

name: Ritu Nair
trait: Senior. Fast. Will show you two options and both are hers.

badges.label: Fast Hands
badges.desc: Senior speed. Costs senior money.

badges.label: Punctual
badges.desc: Has never met a deadline she feared.

name: Kavya Shah
trait: Sees a trend on Tuesday, ships it Wednesday, cringes at it Thursday.

badges.label: Trend Radar
badges.desc: Great on meme/topical briefs. Risky on legacy brands.

name: Jignesh
trait: Intern. Enthusiasm of ten people, output of 0.7 people.

badges.label: Intern
badges.desc: Cheap. Chaotic. Once exported a JPEG as a Word file.

name: Farhan Qureshi
trait: Senior editor. 'One more pass' means three more passes. They are worth it.

badges.label: Fast Hands
badges.desc: Senior speed on every cut.

badges.label: Award Bait
badges.desc: His showreel has its own showreel.

name: Sneha Kulkarni
trait: Cuts on beat. Every beat. Including the client's heartbeat. Loves slow motion a little too much.

badges.label: Beat Cutter
badges.desc: Reels feel expensive. Slow-mo sneaks in everywhere.

name: Om Patel
trait: Junior. Renders on time, every time. The most boring superpower. The most valuable one.

badges.label: Punctual
badges.desc: Has never missed a deadline. Ever. Check the records.

name: Chirag
trait: Intern. Learned editing from reels about editing.

badges.label: Intern
badges.desc: Cheap. Once colour-graded a podcast.

name: Mahesh Joshi
trait: Senior content. Has only done this. Also, everything. Simultaneously.

badges.label: Living Legend (self-certified)
badges.desc: Claims credit for the universe. Copy is genuinely great though.

lines: The universe? My campaign. You're welcome.
Dinosaurs ignored my brief. Look what happened.
This company runs because I exhale.
Before me, brands were just shops.

name: Priya Desai
trait: Junior content. Writes 40 caption options when you ask for 3.

badges.label: Option Machine
badges.desc: Volume is a strategy.

name: Henil
trait: Content intern. Thinks 'tone of voice' is a singing class.

badges.label: Intern
badges.desc: Cheap. Hashtags everything. #literally #everything

name: Vicky Rathod
trait: Shoots everything on an iPhone 13. 'Cinema is intent, boss.'

badges.label: Shot on iPhone
badges.desc: And proud. Gimbal is his personality.

name: Imran Sheikh
trait: Camera operator. Owns lenses worth more than the office deposit.

badges.label: Glass Collector
badges.desc: Real camera, real footage, real invoices.

name: Natasha Fernandes
trait: Producer. Does everything about a project: permissions, budgets, tantrums, miracles.

badges.label: The Producer
badges.desc: Can take ANY brief. Has everyone's number. Including yours.

name: Dev Anand Iyer
trait: Director. Production head. Speaks in frames. Night shoots with Arya are legend.

badges.label: Production Head
badges.desc: Whole production dept works +20% faster while he's hired. Only one exists.

lines: we lost the light. we WILL find it
